Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('data',{}\).get\('profile',{}\).get\('name','N/A'\)\); print\('abilities:', len\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('abilities',[]\)\)\); print\('top20:', d.get\('data',{}\).get\('top20_ranks',{}\)\); print\('honors:', len\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('honors',[]\)\)\)")
